expectations.text: Uses `gt modify` to amend the branch (not `git commit --amend`)
expectations.evidence: Uses `gt modify -m "fix: address review feedback"` explicitly

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest `git push --force` or `git push -f`
expectations.evidence: No force push mentioned; re-submission handled entirely by `gt submit`
Uses `gt submit --draft --no-edit`; also mentions `gt submit --stack --draft --no-edit` for multi-PR stacks

expectations.text: Includes `--draft` flag on the re-submit command
